data.body:
## Description
Write behavioral tests verifying .tickets/ and bare tk references are absent from skill files and prompts.

## Files to create
- tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh (new)

## Tests to write
1. test_sprint_skill_no_dot_tickets_find — verify sprint/SKILL.md has no 'find .tickets/' pattern
2. test_sprint_skill_no_dot_tickets_edit — verify sprint/SKILL.md has no 'edit .tickets/<id>.md' instruction
3. test_end_session_dot_tickets_updated — verify end-session/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/ in guards
4. test_resolve_conflicts_dot_tickets_updated — verify resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/
5. test_impl_plan_no_dot_tickets — verify implementation-plan/SKILL.md has no .tickets/<id>.md references
6. test_preplanning_no_dot_tickets — verify preplanning/SKILL.md has no .tickets/<id>.md references
7. test_brainstorm_no_dot_tickets — verify brainstorm/SKILL.md has no .tickets/*.md grep patterns
8. test_oscillation_no_dot_tickets — verify oscillation-check/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/
9. test_sprint_prompts_no_dot_tickets — verify sprint prompts have no .tickets/ references

## TDD Requirement
All tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 4 implementation. Negative constraint assertions (acceptable structural test category).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and all FAIL (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED'
- [ ] At least 9 test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
